Instructions for building, running, and debugging firmware with QEMU for STM32 targets.

# Purpose
The document provides instructions for setting up and using QEMU for STM32 targets. It includes steps to obtain QEMU, either by using the binary from the SDK or by building it from source. The building process involves installing necessary OS-level prerequisites, setting up `pyenv`, and configuring the QEMU build environment. After building QEMU, users must ensure it is available in their system `PATH`. The document also outlines how to configure, build, and run firmware using QEMU, as well as how to launch a console and debug with GDB. These instructions are tailored for STM32-based boards, facilitating firmware development and testing in a simulated environment.
